assertions.issues: Answer options are rendered as <span> elements (bg-purple-100 class) rather than <button> elements. Clicking them via JavaScript does not trigger React state change to mark answer as selected. The Submit Answer button remains disabled.

frictions.description: Answer options render as <span> elements with CSS styling rather than <button> elements, making them non-interactive via standard click actions
frictions.resolution: Attempted JavaScript click but React state did not update. This is a bug in the drill component where answer selection is not properly wired to React state.

frictions.description: Accessibility tree snapshot does not capture the answer option spans, making it impossible to interact with them via standard agent-browser commands
frictions.resolution: Used get text body to discover elements, but JavaScript click did not trigger React state change

frictions.description: Progress bar text shows inconsistent values (sometimes 'Question 1 of 50' even when 5 questions selected)
frictions.resolution: Observed during testing - possible state synchronization issue

blockers.description: Answer options are rendered as <span> elements with bg-purple-100 class instead of <button> elements. Clicking them via JavaScript does not trigger the React onClick handler to update selected answer state. The Submit Answer button remains disabled.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Tried: 1) Standard click via ref, 2) JavaScript eval click(), 3) Finding element by text and clicking, 4) Clicking by coordinates. None triggered React state update.

summary: Tested 10 assertions for Drill Mode (P3-DRILL-001 to P3-DRILL-010). Filter panel (P3-DRILL-001) and drill settings (P3-DRILL-009) work correctly. Question card displays properly (P3-DRILL-002). However, answer options are rendered as <span> elements instead of <button> elements, and clicking them does not trigger React state update - causing Submit button to remain disabled. This blocks assertions P3-DRILL-003, P3-DRILL-004, P3-DRILL-005, P3-DRILL-006, and P3-DRILL-010. Skip functionality (P3-DRILL-008) appears to work but leaves question content inaccessible. Progress bar (P3-DRILL-007) visible but shows inconsistent values. Core bug: answer selection mechanism not wired to React state.
